name: GREEN DOT CORP
business: Green Dot Corporation is a financial technology platform and registered bank holding company that builds banking and payment solutions. It offers a broad spectrum of financial products including checking accounts, prepaid cards, gift cards, secured credit cards, and money processing services such as tax refunds, cash deposits, and disbursements. Its products are distributed through retail locations, direct channels, B2B partnerships, and tax preparation networks.
sellsTo: Businesses of all sizes (B2B services, including payroll and embedded finance)
Retail distributors (e.g., Walmart and over 90,000 retail locations)
Tax preparation providers and electronic return originators

exposures.sentence: Green Dot Corporation is a financial technology platform and registered bank holding company that builds banking and payment solutions to create value, retain and reward customers, and accelerate growth for businesses of all sizes.
